# Acceptance evidence (#11760): the app survives ambient memory pressure that
# lmkd resolves by killing OTHER processes.
#
# During the soak on the CONSTRAINED emulator (MemTotal 2.9 GiB, lmkd threshold
# 216 MB), lmkd fired 38 kills across 28 distinct packages under
# "reason: low watermark is breached" — genuine memory pressure. ai.elizaos.app
# was NEVER a target (0 lmkd Kill lines name it), even though before this policy
# the in-process inference footprint made it the largest resident process and
# lmkd's first pick (the #11506 forensics: reason=3 LOW_MEMORY at ~3.2 GB RSS).
   2 Kill 'com.google.android.webview:webview_service'
   2 Kill 'com.google.android.permissioncontroller'
   2 Kill 'com.google.android.googlequicksearchbox:search'
   2 Kill 'com.google.android.gms'
   2 Kill 'com.google.android.gms.unstable'
   2 Kill 'com.google.android.apps.photos'
   2 Kill 'com.google.android.apps.messaging'
   2 Kill 'com.android.keychain'
   2 Kill 'com.android.chrome'
   2 Kill 'android.process.acore'
   1 Kill 'com.google.android.settings.intelligence'
   1 Kill 'com.google.android.rkpdapp'
   1 Kill 'com.google.android.photopicker'
   1 Kill 'com.google.android.partnersetup'
   1 Kill 'com.google.android.packageinstaller'
   1 Kill 'com.google.android.ondevicepersonalization.services'
   1 Kill 'com.google.android.marvin.talkback'
   1 Kill 'com.google.android.gms.ui'
   1 Kill 'com.google.android.federatedcompute'
   1 Kill 'com.google.android.configupdater'
   1 Kill 'com.google.android.as.oss'
   1 Kill 'com.google.android.apps.wellbeing'
   1 Kill 'com.google.android.apps.safetyhub'
   1 Kill 'com.android.settings'
   1 Kill 'com.android.localtransport'
   1 Kill 'com.android.externalstorage'
   1 Kill 'com.android.dynsystem'
   1 Kill 'com.android.dynsystem:dynsystem'

ai.elizaos.app lmkd Kill count: 0
total lmkd Kill events: 38
